title: Some New Orders of Hadamard and Skew-Hadamard Matrices
relevance: Constructs H(1004) and H(2524) using GS array with hashing-based matching — the direct methodological predecessor for H(668)

title: Two classes of Hadamard matrices of Goethals-Seidel type
relevance: Introduces new GS-type classes and constructs matrices up to order 2524; discusses difficulties for small unknown orders including 668

title: Goethals-Seidel Difference Families with Symmetric or Skew Base Blocks
relevance: Classifies GS difference families with symmetric/skew blocks for v < 50; methodology extends to larger v

title: An infinite family of Goethals-Seidel arrays
relevance: Proves infinite family for q ≡ 3 mod 8 prime powers; 167 ≡ 7 mod 8 falls outside this family

title: Several Goethals-Seidel Sequences with Special Structures
relevance: Recent work on GS sequences; notes 668 as smallest unconstructed order
